description_long: This rifle features a modern, angular design with a matte black finish and a distinctive spiked muzzle device at the front. The body is composed of straight, geometric lines, with a prominent rectangular stock and a pistol grip integrated into the lower frame. A cylindrical sighting device is mounted on the top rail, suggesting enhanced targeting capabilities. The barrel is relatively short and capped with a spiked flash hider or muzzle brake, giving the weapon an aggressive appearance. The magazine is not externally visible, indicating it may be internal or not modeled. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, with some synthetic or polymer components for the grip and stock.
description: A modern, angular black rifle with a spiked muzzle device, integrated pistol grip, and a top-mounted cylindrical sight.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, angular stock, pistol grip, and spiked muzzle device.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the spiked muzzle device and the circular barrel opening.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same angular features and the top-mounted sight.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the stock and the alignment of the barrel and sight.
